title: callitriche aquatica subsp. truncata
intro: Callitriche aquatica subsp. truncata, also known as truncated water starwort, is a subspecies of aquatic plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in shallow water and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callitriche aquatica subsp. truncata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate digestive issues.
